betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Black Hole Generator§f is a §6single block§f infrastructure tile that contains a §6micro-singular black hole§f capable of producing §6100,000 RF/t§f continuously — enough power for an entire base. It is the §6endgame power source§f of the AR progression and one of the most powerful RF generators in the entire modpack.

§6Production Path (blackholegenerator.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  b g b
  p c p
  m s m
  ```
- Key: `b`=§6libvulpes:battery:1§f (Advanced Battery), `g`=§6Structure Tower§f (advancedrocketry:structuretower, quest 10001), `c`=§6libvulpes:advstructuremachine§f (Advanced Machine Structure), `p`=§6plateTitaniumAluminide§f (forge:ore_dict), `m`=§6blockMotor§f (forge:ore_dict), `s`=§6User Interface§f (advancedrocketry:misc:0)
- Output: 1x §6Black Hole Generator§f (advancedrocketry:blackholegenerator)
- Power: 100,000 RF/t continuous output, no fuel required

The black hole generator requires §6no fuel§f — it generates power by slowly evaporating the contained singularity via §6Hawking radiation§f. The generator's GUI shows the §6singularity mass§f (decreases over time) and the §6estimated lifetime§f. A fully-charged black hole generator lasts §6~30 real-time days§f of continuous use.

The black hole generator is a prerequisite for the §6Interstellar Mission§f (chain) and the §6Space Elevator§f (10067) operations. It is the §6single most powerful§f power source in AR and replaces every other power generator for endgame bases.

§cWarning§f: When a §6Black Hole Generator§f's singularity mass reaches zero, the generator §6collapses§f into a §6mini black hole§f entity that pulls all nearby blocks into itself. The collapse deals §61000 HP of damage§f to anything within §620 blocks§f and destroys every block in a §6100-block radius§f.

§eTip§f: Build the §6Black Hole Generator§f in a §6dedicated power room§f at least §6200 blocks§f from your main base. Pair with a §6Tesseract§f or §6Dimensional Transceiver§f for safe long-distance power transmission. Always have a §6backup power source§f — if the singularity collapses during a critical operation, the damage is catastrophic.
